g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a packet from the internet reach my VPC?')
sendPrompt('What is an Internet Gateway and how does it work with route tables?')
sendPrompt('What routes go inside a public route table?')
sendPrompt('What routes go inside a private route table?')
sendPrompt('How do I associate a public subnet with a route table in Terraform?')
sendPrompt('Why do all public subnets share the same route table?')
sendPrompt('Can I associate multiple subnets with the same route table?')
sendPrompt('Why does each private subnet need its own route table?')
sendPrompt('How does a private subnet route outbound traffic?')
sendPrompt('What happens to outbound traffic from a private subnet without NAT?')
sendPrompt('What is the local route in a VPC route table?')
g.text: 10.0.0.0/16 → local — present in ALL route tables
